characters.name: Anno Syura
characters.description: Anno Syura庵野しゅうらCivilization(s)LightFamilyAnno Akira(sister)Voice Actor(s)宮沢 小春Koharu MiyazawaVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Anno_Syura.mp3Anno Syurais a character in theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofVAN Beethoven, Zenith of "Shura"and attends Private Ohryu High School. A socially skilled and kind “behind-the-scenes” vice-leader, she always supports members who are talented but sometimes a bit scatterbrained.

characters.name: Asche Nagareboshi
characters.description:
Asche Nagareboshi流星アーシュCivilization(s)WaterNatureVoice Actor(s)逢田 梨香子Rikako AidaVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Asche_Nagareboshi.mp3Asche Nagareboshiis one of the main protagonists of theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofGaiash Kaiser, the Meteorand attends Private Ohryu High School. She is admired by everyone as a perfect “high-class flower” and, because of this positive misunderstanding, hides the fact that she is actually timid, easily scared, and has a fragile “tofu” mentality.
Upon entering high school, she was eager to enjoy a glamorous JK life, but was entrusted with the mission of protecting the school as the student council president of the “Dragon Girl Student Council”, and struggles under the weight of that responsibility.

characters.name: Asche Nagareboshi

She is the human form ofGaiash Kaiser, the Meteorand attends Private Ohryu High School. She is admired by everyone as a perfect “high-class flower” and, because of this positive misunderstanding, hides the fact that she is actually timid, easily scared, and has a fragile “tofu” mentality.
Upon entering high school, she was eager to enjoy a glamorous JK life, but was entrusted with the mission of protecting the school as the student council president of the “Dragon Girl Student Council”, and struggles under the weight of that responsibility.

characters.name: Crim Heart Galaxy
characters.description: Crim Heart Galaxyクリム・美心・ギャラクシーCivilization(s)FireVoice Actor(s)三浦千幸Chiyuki MiuraVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Crim_Heart_Galaxy.mp3Crim Heart Galaxyis a character in theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofBatogaiginga, Explosive King Deluxeand attends Private Ryuo Academy. An athlete aiming to be the world's top competitor. She is the world student champion in the heptathlon, can run long distances, and excels at competitive games, though she actually can't swim. She is lazy and usually speaks in simple words.

characters.name: Edomoto Q Mari
characters.description: Edomoto Q Mari江戸素・Q・真理Civilization(s)WaterVoice Actor(s)三川華月Haruna MikawaVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Edomoto_Q_Mari.mp3Edomoto Q Maris a character in theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofQ.E.D., Dragment Kingand attends Pythagoras Academy Attached High School.. A brilliant student who consistently ranks first nationwide on academic tests. Within PENTADRÉ, she is an excellent strategist, offering clear and insightful plans. She has a long-standing relationship with Inochi from elementary school, and they mutually respect each other's abilities.

characters.name: Fujiko Kumada
characters.description: Fujiko Kumada熊田不死子Civilization(s)DarknessVoice Actor(s)綾瀬未来Mirai AyaseVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Fujiko_Kumada.mp3Fujiko Kumadais a character in theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofDeathshiraz, Devil Corrupt Kingand attends Marrow Art School. A student who is also a cutting-edge fashion designer. She isSuzu Kumadascousin and highly regarded even among the talented Kumada family, handling anything at her own pace. She finds Suzu small and adorable, though Suzu does not like her.

characters.name: Hoshi Feruki
characters.description: Hoshi Feruki星増樹Civilization(s)NatureVoice Actor(s)日向 もかMoka HinataVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Hoshi_Feruki.mp3Hoshi Ferukiis a character in theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofInfelstargeand attends Private Ohryu High School. She has been friends withThanasince elementary school and has known the Anno sisters since middle school. From elementary school, she promised Thana they would form a band together. While it may seem like Thana leads her around, Feruki skillfully supports and manages things, making everything work smoothly.

characters.name: Mega Maguma
characters.description: Mega Maguma真久間メガCivilization(s)FireVoice Actor(s)佳奈 荻野Kana OginoVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Mega_Maguma.mp3Mega Magumais one of the main protagonists of theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofMega Magma Dragonand attends Private Ohryu High School. A completely airheaded and eccentric "mysterious girl" who is a childhood friend ofGyai Chifuin, She has a free-spirited (natural) personality and her actions are totally unpredictable and outlandish. She goes at her own pace to the extent of involving those around her, often causing trouble, though she doesn’t care at all. She often interacts with Gyai andAsche, who are in the same class.

characters.name: Mega Maguma
characters.description: Mega Maguma真久間メガCivilization(s)FireVoice Actor(s)佳奈 荻野Kana OginoVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Mega_Maguma.mp3Mega Magumais one of the main protagonists of theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She goes at her own pace to the extent of involving those around her, often causing trouble, though she doesn’t care at all. She often interacts with Gyai andAsche, who are in the same class.

characters.name: Mikoto Amano
characters.description: Mikoto Amano天命Civilization(s)LightVoice Actor(s)羽澄ななNana HasumiVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Mikoto_Amano.mp3Mikoto Amanois a character in theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofNeverlast, Destiny Adorationand attends Saint Zodia Academy. Daughter of the Amano Conglomerate, one of the world’s four major financial powers. A born queen who has embodied leadership principles as the group’s representative. Guided by the spirit of noblesse oblige, she is deeply loyal and follows the principle of repaying any favor tenfold.

characters.name: Mikoto Amano

characters.name: Tetsuhito Mikado
characters.description: Tetsuhito Mikado帝哲人Civilization(s)NatureVoice Actor(s)日南歩乃華Honoka HinamiVoicelinehttps://duelmasters.fandom.com/wiki/File:Tetsuhito_Mikado.mp3Tetsuhito Mikadois a character in theI don't wanna be a Dragon Girl!series. She is the human form ofThe=Deadman, True Eviland attends Tokutoku Buddhist Technical College as a Cheer Squad Captain. Cheer squad captain who runs a rough-and-tumble high school. Small in stature but big in attitude. She has a sharp tongue, yet is incredibly devoted, always supporting and cheering for others with a caring, big-sister personality.
